TeacherAttendancePage.jsx - Working correctly with all features: date picker, status buttons, mark all present, save attendance
Backend restructure successful - all existing APIs (login, dashboard stats) still working
New APIs (teacher-attendance, communication) working correctly with proper authentication

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Teacher Attendance working, Communication Center page not routed

2_dashboard_stats_api.description: Dashboard Stats API works after restructure
